subject: Geodude (Kanto form), a gray rock-bodied creature with arms, resting on rocky terrain
description: Geodude sits atop a sandy rocky outcropping, its rounded gray stone body propped up on two rocky fists. The body texture is visibly rough and stone-like with no dark coloration or magnetic features — consistent with the standard Kanto form. The face shows a stern expression with visible brow ridges over small eyes. The background is a warm sandy-tan landscape under a light sky, suggesting an arid or cliff-side environment. The overall palette is muted grays and tans.
foreground: Kanto Geodude resting on rocky fists atop sandy terrain
background: warm sandy landscape with pale sky
